name: soundgrid
description: SoundGrid — an open-source soundboard for Windows and macOS that plays audio clips into your microphone stream.
author: SoundGrid Contributors

scripts.dev:main: wait-on tcp:5173 && npm run build:native && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && cross-env-shell electron .
scripts.build: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:main
scripts.pack:win: npm run vendor:vb-cable && npm run build:native && npm run build && electron-builder --dir --win --x64 --publish never
scripts.pack:mac: npm run build:native:mac-universal && npm run build && electron-builder --dir --mac --universal --publish never
scripts.dist: npm run vendor:vb-cable && npm run build:native && npm run build && electron-builder --win nsis portable --x64 --publish never
scripts.dist:installer: npm run vendor:vb-cable && npm run build:native && npm run build && electron-builder --win nsis --x64 --publish never
scripts.dist:portable: npm run vendor:vb-cable && npm run build:native && npm run build && electron-builder --win portable --x64 --publish never
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build:native:mac-universal && npm run build && electron-builder --mac dmg zip --universal --publish never
